name: @webspinner-foundation/witness
description: The verification Spinner of the Warp build loop. Drives a Weaver's Tension scenario end-to-end through the live Loom via a headless browser, then reports pass/fail per step with plain-English narration. Witness is the substrate that lets Author iterate on Spinner code without a Wizard in the loop — and the unit-of-verification that replaces brittle line-level unit tests with behavioural scenario truth.

capabilities.name: verifyScenario
capabilities.description: Run a Weaver's Tension scenario end-to-end. Witness launches a headless Chromium against the Loom, authenticates (as superuser by default; user-collection on request), creates a fresh run, presses Start, watches every step's ribbon status and narration, and returns a structured report. Used by the Author Spinner as the autonomous verification gate; used by the Wizard for one-shot verification of an authored Spinner.

loomBase.description: Origin of the live Loom to drive. Default: WARP_LOOM_BASE env var or http://johns-mac-studio.local:3000.

authMode.description: Which session-collection token to inject. 'superuser' uses the Loom's bootstrap PB creds; 'webspinner' creates/auths a verified test user and uses that token (catches privilege-boundary bugs).

cleanupSpinnerSlug.description: Optional. If set, Witness deletes any wp_skein row + ~/Cells/spinners/<slug> bundle for this slug before running the scenario. Used when the scenario installs a Spinner and prior state would block it.

runTimeoutMs.description: Maximum total wall-clock for the scenario.

ok.description: True iff every ribbon step ended in 'completed' or 'remediated'.

runId.description: The wp_weavers_tension_runs.run_id for the run Witness drove.

escalation.description: Present when the run escalated. Plain-English description of what failed plus structured evidence the Author/Mender can act on.

ribbon.description: Final ribbon state — one entry per scenario step.
